experience.title: Junior Sustainability Analyst
responsibilities: Assisted team in collecting and analyzing data related to sustainability practices.
Supported project management efforts for small-scale environmental initiatives.
Conducted basic data entry and maintained database records.

experience.title: Intern Energy Consultant
responsibilities: Helped in developing presentations on renewable energy trends.
Participated in team meetings to discuss energy project updates.
Performed routine analysis using Excel for energy consumption reports.

response.summary: Detail-oriented analyst with experience in sustainability projects and data entry. Seeking to transition into the energy sector.
